college_info.college_name: Sri Venkateswara Engineering College Tirupati: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Sri Venkateswara Engineering College Tirupati admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Which courses does Sri Venkateswara Engineering College offer to students?
faqs.answer: Sri Venkateswara Engineering College has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Sri Venkateswara Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, M.E./M.Tech specializations in VLSI Design, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Venkateswara Engineering College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Sri Venkateswara Engineering College Tirupati offers M.E./M.Tech and MCA. The fees for Sri Venkateswara Engineering College Tirupati courses range between INR 70,000 to 1,71,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Sri Venkateswara Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty support, strong placements and a vibrant campus life with ample scope.

review_content.Placements: B.Tech CSE 2025 batch saw around 88 percent placements, with the highest package at 22 LPA, the lowest at 3.6 LPA, and the average at 7.8 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Amazon, and Microsoft. About 75 percent secured internships in leading IT and consulting firms with roles like software engineer, data analyst and cloud engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our CSE department offers Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, advanced computer labs, and a well-stocked digital library. Hostels are well-maintained with decent rooms, hygienic mess and canteen food, medical facilities, and good sports infrastructure for games and recreation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: My experience and opinion.

review_content.Placements: I pursued computer science and engineering at this college. Coming to placements, few belong to our domain and more are non-IT jobs. Top IT companies come for placements like TCS, Infosys, IBM, etc. They give special training for the placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good and impressive. View from college is also good. College has a pleasant environment. Everyone likes the college environment. There is a separate hostel for girls and boys. Girls hostel is within the college compound whereas boys hostel is outside the college premises.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college life at SVCE.

review_content.Placements: 40% students got placed. The highest package is 720000 PA and the lowest package is INR 250000. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, Tech mahindra, etc. 100% students got internship. Top roles are data science, data analytics and full stack.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms and labs are good. No Wi-Fi is provided. Labs are average and there is no hostel. The canteen and mess are good. Sports activities are also available in the college. Medical care is also good in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty. Good placements were offered in 2018, but not now.

review_content.Placements: I think 90% of the students were placed in my course. The highest package is 12 lacs per annum. The lowest package is 3 lacs per annum. The average package is 6 lacs per annum. The top recruiting company for my course is IBM. Top roles offered in my course are team leader, HR, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my classroom, the projector is not working. Classrooms are okay, not bad. There is no Wi-Fi in the college or hostel. Some faculty are good at teaching. 1st year labs are very good. The library is good. The hostel food is the worst. Cleaning is not good in hostels. The cost of the canteen is very high.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My college name is Tamil Nadu also.

review_content.Placements: Many students are placed in the CSE department and electrical students are placed in the Coimbatore company. Also, students in Artificial intelligence are placed in 50,000 salaries per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is available and the canteen is also available and all are A/c and the library also. But there some many broken benches and blackboards and the Wi-Fi speed in my college is good.
review_content.Faculty: Theory and practical are also good, the best performances in my college and the best results for many students. And some students in faculty and teachers. But most of the students passed the best way. This college has the best way of teaching method.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure, placements, and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in some good companies. The highest salary package offered is almost 12 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, etc. Most of the seniors got placed in good companies like Wipro and Infosys. I recommend freshers to join our college because it has good infrastructure and good environment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure, with good labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of hostel food is better compared to others. I recommend to the freshers to join our college and our college hostel is good. The hostel mess is good, with a lot of security care. Hostel has medical room.

description: Sri Venkateswara Engineering College Tirupati cutoff 2025 is available for admission to B.E. / B.Tech via the AP EAMCET exams. Students can scroll down this page to view the cutoff of various accepted exams for different courses, rounds and categories. A few more updates can be seen in the pointers below:

Sri Venkateswara Engineering College Tirupati AP EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all rounds and categories under both the All India and Home State quota. For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff was 69499.1, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

Sri Venkateswara Engineering College Tirupati B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. As per the last round of AP EAMCET, the hardest course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech for the General AI category, which had the cutoff of 69499.1.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories and quotas.

Students who want admission to Sri Venkateswara Engineering College for courses offered via AP EAMCET examination can see the table below to know the important dates for enrolment. Candidates can also download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.

The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) conducts the AP EAMCET exam for admission to BTech, BPharm, and BSc in Agriculture, Bachelor's in Fisheries, and Bachelor's in Horticulture programmes. reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Our campus environment is better. The laboratories, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. The cafeteria is very clean, and the food quality is good. It also has a large playground, and a sports room is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placement and knowledge gained.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with both classes, hostels and classrooms. Labs contain various equipment according to the course. Good library facility is available as there were various kinds of books that enhance knowledge and helps to increase mental ability. Hostel has good facilities with quality food, rooms, canteen etc.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Tirupati and high in placements. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Separate libraries for each department and very clean and neat classrooms. We have good projectors and AC labs. The food in the canteen is awesome and we love it. Even the money charged for food is also affordable for students. Quality and purity always stay in first place in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest joining our college, placements are good wherever you go in India same companies are visit
reviews.review_text: Our campus is fully equipped with a good infrastructure. For every course, we have different labs with good working conditions. For every lab, there is a lab assistant and lab technician. On our campus, Wi-Fi is available for 24hrs, especially for students with their log-in ids. We have a central library with a different number of volumes with a good atmosphere which we get interested in studying. For us, our college provides hostel facilities for boys and girls. In the hostel, we have hygienic ...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placements. Better events and canteen .
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and good looking. There is lab and equipment to learn and big campus. The college hostel fee is 70k and food is good but hostel is 1km away from college for boys and for girls it is in campus only. The food is good in college hostel. You need to take permission to go out of campus if you are a college hostler.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkateswara Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with a pleasant atmosphere. Wi-Fi facility is available. The library, classrooms, and labs are good with better books and equipment. Medical facilities are available 24/7. Sports and games are a bit poor but held during fests.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good place for everything and students can enjoy.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in this college. The classes are very neat and well maintained. Many libraries are there to refer information. Now there are two canteens available one for fast food or meals and the other one for packed food like ice creams, biscuits, cool drinks, etc. All kinds of foods are available like healthy and junk food are also provided.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is the latest expected JEE Main cutoff for the year?
faqs.answer:
NIT Manipur JEE Main cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to the BTech courses. faqs.question: Which courses does Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology offer to students?
faqs.answer: Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Information Technology.

placements.overview:
Established in 1998, Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology is located in Nashik, Maharashtra. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 9 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 1,71,298 to 2,97,344.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 1,71,298 to 2,97,344.

faqs.answer: A:    Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Information Technology.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty is good, there are good placements in 2021, nice infrastructure and advanced facilities.

review_content.Placements: According to my college records, more than 50% were placed in 2023. The highest package offered was 7 LPA; the average package was 4.5 LPA; and the lowest was 3.2 LPA. The top retailers are Infosys, TCS, WNS, and L&T. Around 47 students did internships at the college, which were provided by Shivandu Infotech. The roles offered are data analysts.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities were mostly good but needed more development as per the area our institute has; otherwise, classrooms are very nice with projectors, computer systems and for safety, fire extinguishers on the ceiling. The facilities provided in the hostel were decent, but having proper security still needs more development. The mess is not so good, the canteen is below average, and the medical facilities are great. As there is a hospital on our campus, there is a lot of support for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of students got placed in our course. Around 2-3 companies visit our college to recruit students. The average salary package offered is 3.60 LPA. Around 2-3, students got placed off campus. The highest salary package offered is 7.20 LPA. Almost 60% of students got internships. Top roles offered are developer and software tester.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel is good. Labs, classrooms, and library are good. The campus maintains good discipline, with separate hostels for girls and boys. Security is well-maintained. Medical facilities are available in our college. A playground is available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements in 2019–20 and average facilities but is suitable for fees.

review_content.Placements: College gives very rare opportunities for placements to our batchmates. Only 2 or 3 average companies come into college, and they have only a 1.5 LPA salary package for students after placements. Students can try off-campus drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: The mess is average. Only a few items are good, and others are very bad in taste. The canteen is average. Only a few items are available in the canteen. There are good facilities for sports. Classrooms are clean and fresh in nature. The library is good but sometimes has a loose internet connection.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Not much satisfied with placements, but the course and infrastructure are good.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not much good. We have to go for off-campus placements. We need to work on our own for placements. Some faculty members are good and can help us and provide better guidance. But no placement assistance is provided like in other colleges in the same district. One will regret joining here if they are looking for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The campus environment is very good. Wi-Fi is available. Mess facilities are available only in the hostel. The canteen is not in good condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best engineering college in Nashik.

review_content.Placements: From my batch, 8-10 students were placed in different companies. For Mechanical, the highest Package offered - 5 LPA (IT Company) the lowest Package offered - 3.2 LPA (JSW) Top Recruiting companies were: 1) JSW (Jindal Saw Limited Nashik) 2) KSB Pumps Pune 3) Technoforge (visits every year) 4) Technoforce 5) Praz Industries 6) Some IT Companies also visit for hiring mechanical engineers. 7) Other small scale agricultural and pharmeceutical having MOU with SVIT also visit. As such, for our batch, there wasn't any internship provided by college but right now they are providing mandatory internships to Final year students so as to improve their practical exposure to industrial processes and equipments. Top Roles offered were: 1) Graduate Engineer Trainee 2) Production Engineer 3) Junior Design Engineer .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to just complete your course and want to enjoy a good campus then go for it.

review_content.Placements: I think only 30 - 40 percent students were placed in the passing year and the highest package was 3.1 lakhs and most of them were started from 1.5 to 2 lakhs. Most of my batchmates were unemployed and only few hardly 4-5 choose internship where our seniors were working.
review_content.Infrastructure: Buildings, classrooms are good. Library was good but the hostel building was like jail. Very limited facilities and there are only two general stores on campus if those are closed there is nothing in the campus where you can buy something. Canteen building is also good but the contractor was the worst.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only). For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sir Visvesvaraya Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is good, there are good placements in 2021, nice infrastructure and advanced facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were mostly good but needed more development as per the area our institute has; otherwise, classrooms are very nice with projectors, computer systems and for safety, fire extinguishers on the ceiling.  The facilities provided in the hostel were decent, but having proper security still needs more development. The mess is not so good, the canteen is below average, and the medical facilities are great. As there is a hospital on our campus, there is a lot of support for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel is good. Labs, classrooms, and library are good. The campus maintains good discipline, with separate hostels for girls and boys. Security is well-maintained. Medical facilities are available in our college. A playground is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements in 2019–20 and average facilities but is suitable for fees.
reviews.review_text: The mess is average. Only a few items are good, and others are very bad in taste. The canteen is average. Only a few items are available in the canteen. There are good facilities for sports. Classrooms are clean and fresh in nature. The library is good but sometimes has a loose internet connection.

reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied with placements, but the course and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The campus environment is very good. Wi-Fi is available. Mess facilities are available only in the hostel. The canteen is not in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best engineering college in Nashik.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also one of the strength of this college since its location is very peaceful and away from crows with a Mountain View Hostel separately for boys and girls. There is seperate departmental building for mechanical students equipped with all labs (FM, SOM, TOM, DOM, MQC, HT, CAD CAM Labs) required. There is also a seminar hall separately for departmental activities, Presentations, and Guest Lectures for mechanical Students only. The hostel and mess facilities are also very good...

reviews.review_heading: If you want to just complete your course and want to enjoy a good campus then go for it.
reviews.review_text: Buildings, classrooms are good. Library was good but the hostel building was like jail. Very limited facilities and there are only two general stores on campus if those are closed there is nothing in the campus where you can buy something. Canteen building is also good but the contractor was the worst.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is Good college.
reviews.review_text: The college is in the very beautiful area of Nashik. The infrastructure is also very good. Even we mechanical engineering students have a separate building for mechanical branch. There are canteen facilities available in the college which is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an awesome college and is located in a natural scenario.
reviews.review_text: Our college is spread over 73 acres and is surrounded by hills. There is a Wi-Fi facility throughout the college. Our college is located in Nashik-Pune, Mumbai-Shirdi highway and is about 12 km away from Nashik central railway station. As it is away from the city, the atmosphere is free from pollution. There are hostel facilities for both girls and boys. There will be good food and mess arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were not that good. Otherwise, our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms here are good, and the library is well maintained. There are very many departments and courses like mechanical, computer, chemical engineering, etc. The hostel is very well maintained, and they take special care for the food served in the hostel as well as canteen. The medical facility is poor, and sports and games facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: I am moderately satisfied, and our college has nice faculty members and the environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 4 buildings and one hostel. The main building includes electrical, chemical, mechanical, computer and IT engineering departments, including labs. Another building includes a seminar hall, E&TC department, principal office and MBA department. One is building is assigned separately for workshops, which is fully equipped with all the necessary tools.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges ever.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides high-speed Wi-Fi facilities on the campus as well as the hostel. There are all well-developed departmental labs. Our college also has a huge central library with IEEE login, and there are smart digital classrooms. Our college provides the best hostel at affordable fees, and there is a separate wing according to the year in which students are pursuing. Our college provides doctor appointment regularly in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college does not provide placements and has very poor management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better. It is too old, and no renovation happened there. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility for students. Canteen facility is poor. There is no medical facility on an urgent basis. There is no management between principal and any other teaching staff members, and I am very disappointed with this.

reviews.review_heading: College with good infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college has a spacious library. The library is the best, and there are many books available for students. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms, corridors, canteen and hostel are kept clean. Gardens which are present around the college are well maintained. The college also has a good mess for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: SVIT is a very good college for education.
reviews.review_text: The academic buildings are good. The campus environment is mesmerising. All the academic buildings have good connectivity. Wi-Fi facility is good, but its speed is moderate. The central library is well-maintained, and also each department has a library for students. The medical and sports facilities are good. The college students take part in various competitions like sports, project presentation, paperwork etc.

reviews.review_heading: SVIT is college which provides you quality teaching in affordable price.
reviews.review_text: That's the main thing I want to describe here. Infrastructure is very cool and surrounding atmosphere also. Classrooms are big in size also fully furnished labs present. Though college is in rural area but overall infrastructure is superb. Wi-Fi facility also available with good speed. Canteen food is average in quality. Hostel rooms are also good but in some rooms there is lack of beds and cupboards.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Sanjeevan Engineering and Technology Institute (SETI, Panhala):

faqs.answer:
A:    Sanjeevan Engineering and Technology Institute (SETI, Panhala) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognized institute/board are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

reviews_list.review_title: Good institute for rural area students. The college provides good education.

review_content.Placements: The company named Dhoot Transmission Private Limited, Pune hired 23 students from the electrical department and 17 students from electronic and telecommunications department. This company offered a salary of Rs. 9,500 per month during the training period, which is about 6 months, and they also provide free transportation facility.
review_content.Infrastructure: Sanjeevan college is located at a historical place named Panhala. The environment of the college is good, and it helps the students to study. The college provides the Wi-Fi facility. The college also provides hostel facility for both girls and boys. The college is 20 km away from Kolhapur. Well-educated faculty members are available in the respective departments, and also there are digital classrooms available in the college. The students of the college play games like volleyball, football and basketball.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Teacher faculty is good. Good placements throughout. Good infrastructure with great nature surround.

review_content.Placements: Good placement efforts About 50 to 55% of students were placed from my senior batch. The highest salary was about 7 lac per year. In our industrial area company were offered us a job. Jonior Engineer, Quality Control dept, Production Safety Engineers etc. And much more.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good equipped. Classrooms are well maintained and also with good Environment. We have huge library section also with reading Room. All About 1 lac book of Graduation are available. And 20000 books for UG a d PG are available. Medical Facilities are also provided in college campus. Our Sports and Games record in Lead college and university level are excellent.

review_summary.college_name: Sanjeevan Engineering and Technology Institute (SETI, Panhala) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: If you want to do engineering, then don't join this college.

content.Placements: Out of 80 students, only 20 students got placed. Companies like Bentley Systems, Persistent Systems, Capgemini and TCS visit our college for placements. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA by Persistent Systems. Only 5-6 students from our course got an internship at the college. Roles like system architect, DevOps, etc., are offered in our course for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is awesome. The college situated at a hill station, so it has very good weather. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility, and each year students have a different floor with different classrooms. Cleanness was daily done by staff. The library facility was average. The hostel facility was good, and it is very secure about women. The canteen was bad. The college ground is bad, and it is like just plane ground. There is no management, and anyone can come and go.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sanjeevan Engineering and Technology Institute (SETI, Panhala).

content.Placements: An MNC named Acty System Pvt. Ltd. has conducted the placement drive in our college. The college had also tried to invite many other companies. Many of the students were placed from this drive. Now the college will be focusing on things like how to invite more number of companies to the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, good library and the reading room. The bus facilities are also available for the students who live in nearby places. The college also provides hostel facility for both girls and boys. The college focuses on students academic as well as sports skills.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good institute for rural area students. The college provides good education.

content.Placements: The company named Dhoot Transmission Private Limited, Pune hired 23 students from the electrical department and 17 students from electronic and telecommunications department. This company offered a salary of Rs. 9,500 per month during the training period, which is about 6 months, and they also provide free transportation facility.
content.Infrastructure: Sanjeevan college is located at a historical place named Panhala. The environment of the college is good, and it helps the students to study. The college provides the Wi-Fi facility. The college also provides hostel facility for both girls and boys. The college is 20 km away from Kolhapur. Well-educated faculty members are available in the respective departments, and also there are digital classrooms available in the college. The students of the college play games like volleyball, football and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Teacher faculty is good. Good placements throughout. Good infrastructure with great nature surround.

content.Placements: Good placement efforts About 50 to 55% of students were placed from my senior batch. The highest salary was about 7 lac per year. In our industrial area company were offered us a job. Jonior Engineer, Quality Control dept, Production Safety Engineers etc. And much more.
content.Infrastructure: In my college Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good equipped. Classrooms are well maintained and also with good Environment. We have huge library section also with reading Room. All About 1 lac book of Graduation are available. And 20000 books for UG a d PG are available. Medical Facilities are also provided in college campus. Our Sports and Games record in Lead college and university level are excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure facilities.

content.Placements: You cannot guarantee a placement in Civil steam at Seti. But if you look at the quality of practical exposure it's good. My batch placements were very poor. Even my senior batch students were not placed. Even though 2-3 companies visited the major reason was lack of interest in students. There is a placement cell but it is not so efficient for civil department.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at Sanjeevan is really worth studying. You can enjoy your time there. As panhala is a hill station, it adds to the natural beauty. The classrooms are very spacious. Sports is something you will always find encouraged at Sanjeevan. Quality of food is okay. Hostel rooms are very well maintained.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sanjeevan Engineering and Technology Institute (SETI, Panhala) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sanjeevan Engineering and Technology Institute (SETI, Panhala) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognized institute/board are eligible to apply.M.E.

review_summary.college_name: NRI Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because it is value for money and the faculty members are very good-natured.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students got placed in my course. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top-most companies that visit our college are Wipro, TCS, etc. 75 percent of students got internships in my course in IT companies. There are enough roles, so we can go for it.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good. The only drawback is that attending classes is compulsory for everyone, or else strict action will be taken against us. There is a good infrastructure. There is a library, which is most important. Our college conducts so many fests and sports days.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college is very awesome to take admission and enjoy many things like events or faculty teaching.

content.Placements: The highest placement is that more than 75% of students are placed. Top companies are coming to the college, and many students intern and get job offers from various companies. More than a few students are hired by top companies. In my course, top offers rolled out for software engineers and backend roles.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are the best on campus. The highest speed internet and smart classrooms, like biometric attendance, AC setup, or projectors, are available in my classroom. Many types of sports are played online or offline, the mess food is excellent, and the canteen is super.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is quite decent and the academic faculty members are very good.

content.Placements: The college placements were overall average, with decent opportunities for students. The placement is average with a mix of decent and good opportunities. Overall placement support is not satisfactory. Most students get placed with decent jobs by the college.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good with good facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful, but a few feel useless. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is quite decent and the academic faculty is very good.

content.Placements: The college placements were overall average, with decent opportunity for students. The placements are average with a mix of decent and moderate opportunity. Overall placement support is not satisfactory. Most students get placed with decent jobs by the college.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, providing facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful but a few feel outdated. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's good for low-fee degrees, but college management is not very good.

content.Placements: I am a student from the 2025 pass-out batch, pursuing my degree in Computer Science algorithms. Along with academics, the supportive environment of my college played an important role in shaping my confidence and professional growth. Overall, being a part of the 2025 Computer Science batch has been a valuable journey that has contributed to my learning, growth, and preparation for future career opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not good, very bad, but the food is only for eating, and the charge for the hostel is Rs. 6000, but outside the hostel charges Rs. 3000, which is the same as the college hostel. No student likes college hostel, but the management is also bad in the hostel, only the food is good. The infrastructure is well structured, and maintenance is good

paragraphs: NRI Group of Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.NRI Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc., GNM, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 28,500 - 4,24,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 3 years.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in NRI Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
NRI Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage in subjects taken together.
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) of Madhya Pradesh can apply with 40%.
Candidates completing 10+2 with grading system, should have grades equivalent to mentioned aggregate percentage.
Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate percenatge excluding grace marks.
Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis.MCACandidate must have completed BCA/ B.Sc./ B.Com/ B.A. with Mathematics at (10+2) level or at Graduate level with above mentioned aggregate percentage o

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at NRI Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by NRI Group of Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE, PCI, INC. The combined seats available for courses offered at NRI Group of Institutions goes up to 1074.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because it is value for money and the faculty members are very good-natured.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good. The only drawback is that attending classes is compulsory for everyone, or else strict action will be taken against us. There is a good infrastructure. There is a library, which is most important. Our college conducts so many fests and sports days.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NRI Institute of Information Science and TechnologyReviewed on 20 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is quite decent and the academic faculty is very good.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, providing facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful but a few feel outdated. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It's good for low-fee degrees, but college management is not very good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not good, very bad, but the food is only for eating, and the charge for the hostel is Rs. 6000, but outside the hostel charges Rs. 3000, which is the same as the college hostel. No student likes college hostel, but the management is also bad in the hostel, only the food is good. The infrastructure is well structured, and maintenance is good

reviews.review_heading: Decent faculty and supportive environment but curriculum needs an update for industry readiness.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious with proper labs, a library, classrooms, and seminar halls. Hostel facilities are okay, though not luxurious. Mess food is manageable. The college has greenery and a hospital on campus, which is helpful for emergencies. It's an average but reliable choice. With personal effort and faculty guidance, you can build a good career here.

reviews.review_heading: The quality education with strong placement and infrastructure support.
reviews.review_text: NRIIST Bhopal has a well-maintained campus with modern classrooms, SMART labs, Wi-Fi, a central library, and good hostel facilities. The lush green environment and spacious infrastructure create a positive and student-friendly learning atmosphere.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by NRI Institute of Information Science and TechnologyReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Outdated curriculum poor facilities  and weak placement support – not recommended.
reviews.review_text: Department facilities: The labs were outdated and many systems didn’t work properly. WiFi was slow and often unavailable. Classrooms lacked smart boards and were poorly maintained. The library had limited books and outdated material. Hostel & mess: Hostel rooms were congested with poor cleanliness. Washrooms were often dirty. Food in the mess was tasteless repetitive and sometimes unhygienic. Canteen options were very limited.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by NRI Institute of Information Science and TechnologyReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and environment. Good faculty members, but average placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very organized and fully managed. Multiple labs are also arranged at the college every semester, and the network connectivity is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent campus but need to improve.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers decent facilities for the computer science department. Classrooms have projectors, and labs are equipped with internet-connected systems, though some are outdated. Wi-Fi is available but not very reliable. Library is well-stocked with books and digital resources, helpful for exams and projects. Hostel rooms are shared with basic furniture and maintained cleanliness. Mess food is hygienic but average in taste and variety, while the canteen provides better snack options. Medical...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by NRI Institute of Information Science and TechnologyReviewed on 28 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement and supportive faculty, with scope for curriculum improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped computer labs with the latest systems and the highest speed Wi-Fi connectivity available throughout the academic block. Classrooms are spacious, have projectors and smart boards, making lectures more interactive. The central library is well stocked with a variety of technical books and journals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by NRI Institute of Information Science and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are currently ruling in college.
reviews.review_text: The college is very good on the basis of some qualities but lacks a lot. Wi-Fi is only available in labs, and the network is not good in the classrooms. Toilets are very hygienic. Classrooms are clean and good. Labs are advanced for only some subjects. The library has only study material, with no novels or other books. Faculty members are very good, friendly, and hardworking, but some teachers are rude and have professional behavior.

reviews.review_heading: Review by Drx Wajid Khursheed Wani.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough and equipped with modern libraries and laboratories in the college. The hostel has promised food quality and has a ground separate from the park. The college has a number of parks; also, there is a hospital inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Insight of NRI Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The fest happens annually according to the festivals, and many singers and artists come to perform in college. There are many clubs in which you can participate, but it is only available for 1st-year students, and 1st-year students only focus on studies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by NRI Institute of Information Science and TechnologyReviewed on 23 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My short summary of college.
reviews.review_text: Not luxury, but Sunday food items are available at our canteen. There's a huge hall at the canteen, and almost 200 students can sit at the same time and relish the food. The next big thing would be the Amphitheatre, as it is small but always buzzing. Among everything, the college has taken complete care in providing us with a stationery shop right inside the campus. So, all bases covered, and for our basic needs during college hours, we don't have to step beyond the campus gate.

The total seat intake for the BTech programme is 420. BTech students are given the job opportunities needed to grow in their chosen career path. A:    Manav Institute has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityUG DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination and obtained at least 35% marks (33% in case of candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes and
Scheduled Tribes category or Kashmiri Migrants Category) at the qualifying examination.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in engineering or B.Sc. in relevant field from any recognized institute.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed minimum Bachelor degree(B.E./B.Tech) with CSE, IT, ECE, MCA, M.Sc.(Comp), M.Sc.(Math) from a recognized Institute/UniversityB.EdCandidate must have completed graduation from the recognized institute/university.D.EdCandidate must have passed class 10+2 from the recognized board/council.B.PharmaCandidate must have minimum age 17 years or more on 31-12-2023.
Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.

paragraphs: Manav Institute admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences and Teaching and Education.Manav Instituteadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, HSTES, and LEET. Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 75,900 - 1,88,400for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 3 years.

college_info.intro: Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering's popular programme is BTech. The institute offers BTech specialisation in Computer Science & Engineering, Electronic & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Civil Engineering. The institute offers a four-year course in full-time mode. PBCOE Nagpur Btech students are placed in top companies in various sectors, BTech students can work as Software Developers, Robotics Engineers, Artificial Intelligence Engineers, and others. Below are some of the popular programmes offered by the Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses to students. The courses are provided across the Engineering stream. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in five specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, Electronic & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Civil Engineering. At the PG level, the college offers MTech in two specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Some of the popular PBCOE Nagpur courses, their eligibility, and PBCOE Nagpur fees are given below:

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Kerala University of Fisheries and Ocean Studies ranks #30 under the category 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors'.

The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Law, and have a fee structure of around INR 24,156 to 2,64,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech and B.Sc. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and LL.M.

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to Kerala University of Fisheries and Ocean Studies has been closed with the released of Last Round cutoff 2024.  The eligibility requirement is given by Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), the conducting authority of TNEA. As per the eligibility 50% in 10th and 60% in 12th is more than sufficient to appear in TNEA exam. Check out the eligibility criteria given below:A pass in the HSC (Academic: both +1 and +2) or its equivalent with a minimum average percentage is given below:General Category - 45%Backward Class including Backward Class Muslim - 40%MBC & DNC - 40%SC/SCA/ST - 40%ORA pass in any one of the HSC (Vocational Subject: both +1 and +2) as given below with any one of the Engineering subjects namely Mathematics, Physics or Chemistry with a minimum average percentage put together as given below:General Category - 45%Backward Class including Backward Class Muslim - 40%MBC & DNC - 40%SC/SCA/ST - 40%
faqs.question: Can I get into Kerala University of Fisheries and Ocean Studies if I have scored just 50 percentile in 10th and 60 percentile in 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. KEAM result can be checked in the online mode only on the official website. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below: Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.

review_content.Placements: M.Tech program at our college has been an exciting and enriching experience. The placement scenario was promising, around 75% of students secured jobs in leading companies. The highest package offered was 12 LPA. The average package was around 7 LPA. The lowest was around 3 LPA. Renault recruiters like India put association Adani port and other organisations. Internships with around 70% of students working with port authorities, off-shore engineering firms, and research organisation.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department was well-equipped with specialized lab for hydrodynamics, marine geotechnics, and sediment transport studies. Students got access to high-simulation software like and MIKE21, DELFT3D, ANSYS for research and project work with extensive study materials journals, and case studies. Hostels provided comfortable living environment with Wi-Fi uninterrupted, power supply, continuous water, and well-maintained facilities. The food provided was decent and students could also enjoy sports facilities, medical care, and extracurricular activities on the campus.

faqs.answer: Admission to Kerala University of Fisheries and Ocean Studies has been closed with the released of Last Round cutoff 2024. The eligibility requirement is given by Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), the conducting authority of TNEA. As per the eligibility 50% in 10th and 60% in 12th is more than sufficient to appear in TNEA exam. Check out the eligibility criteria given below:A pass in the HSC (Academic: both +1 and +2) or its equivalent with a minimum average percentage is given below:General Category - 45%Backward Class including Backward Class Muslim - 40%MBC & DNC - 40%SC/SCA/ST - 40%ORA pass in any one of the HSC (Vocational Subject: both +1 and +2) as given below with any one of the Engineering subjects namely Mathematics, Physics or Chemistry with a minimum average percentage put together as given below:General Category - 45%Backward Class including Backward Class Muslim - 40%MBC & DNC - 40%SC/SCA/ST - 40%

review_summary.college_name: Kerala University of Fisheries and Ocean Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.F.Sc. in Fisheries Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities are available.

content.Placements: Above 80% students got internships. Top recruiting companies are Matsyafed (Kerala State Cooperative Federation for fisheries development Ltd. ), Innovafeed, CIFNET, and CMFRI. High job opportunities in the Kerala Fisheries Sector. Above 80% students are placed in the course.
content.Infrastructure: Well-developed facilities. For the semester, girls don't get a hostel. The government gives an amount to support those students. The food at private hostels is not good. The campus hostel has much better food than the private hostel. There are good classrooms with smart class ICAR-sponsored classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.F.Sc. in Fisheries Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Life in KUFOS: The campus crowd is less. Entrepreneurs can take the course.

content.Placements: 70% to 90% of students got placed in the fisheries course. The average package is 3-7 LPA. The highest package can reach up to 12 LPA for specialized roles in research or management positions at reputed companies. The lowest package for entry-level jobs may offer around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Neospark, Gadre Marine, and CP. Around 70% of students got internships in marine research centres, aquariums, and conservation projects. Aquaculturist, fish hatchery manager, fisheries officer, farm manager, fisheries extension officer, fishery biologist, aquatic biologist, fish feed mill manager, research scientist, and fisheries inspector are top roles offered in the fisheries course.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: . Good infrastructure and faculty members .

content.Placements: 30 percentage of students are placed in an year the highest package offered was about to 60000 And the lowest was about to 15000 50 Percentage of students get internship to milma, pavizham price mill. The top offered in the cource was quality controller .
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are helpful for all our problems and they will inform all the messages we want In our college Wi-Fi access will provide quickly And we have a good collection of books in library We have a full facilities in class And we have separate labs for subjects.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Technology (M.Tech) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Strong program for marine and coastal engineering.

content.Placements: M.Tech program at our college has been an exciting and enriching experience. The placement scenario was promising, around 75% of students secured jobs in leading companies. The highest package offered was 12 LPA. The average package was around 7 LPA. The lowest was around 3 LPA. Renault recruiters like India put association Adani port and other organisations. Internships with around 70% of students working with port authorities, off-shore engineering firms, and research organisation.
content.Infrastructure: The department was well-equipped with specialized lab for hydrodynamics, marine geotechnics, and sediment transport studies. Students got access to high-simulation software like and MIKE21, DELFT3D, ANSYS for research and project work with extensive study materials journals, and case studies. Hostels provided comfortable living environment with Wi-Fi uninterrupted, power supply, continuous water, and well-maintained facilities. The food provided was decent and students could also enjoy sports facilities, medical care, and extracurricular activities on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: M.F.Sc. in Aquaculture - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A great programme for Marine Science.

content.Placements: Marine Biology programme October college provide a good career opportunities. More than 75% of the students got placed successfully. The highest salary was 10 Lacs and the lowest was 4 Lacs per annum, and the average was 6 Lacs per annum. Around 70% of the students got internship in Marine research centre, aquariums, and conservation project.
content.Infrastructure: The Marine Biology department had great lapse was studying Marine organism, water quality, and ecosystem. There was a dedicated research facility near the cost which allowed us to study marine life closely. The library heart a good collection of marine Science books and journals. Hostels were comfortable with clean rooms, regular Wi-Fi, and uninterrupted power supply with water.

Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc., LL.M. and M.F.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 24,156 - 2,64,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: The university provides well-equipped separate hostel.
reviews.review_text: The university provides well-equipped separate hostels for both boys and girls. There are many facilities and infrastructure provided by the university so that students can excel in their talents. There is a neat and clean canteen with quality food available. The university conducts a food fest, sports and arts each and every year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kerala University of Fisheries and Ocean Studies.
reviews.review_text: The university provides well-equipped laboratories as well as separate hostels for boys and girls. In every classroom, there is a projector, a Wi-Fi connection, etc. Classrooms are large enough to accommodate students. Hostels are good and serve good food. They conduct sports and games so that students can develop their talents in their respective games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for your higher education.
reviews.review_text: The college provides great facilities for the fisheries department. It has a huge library, smart classrooms, a canteen, smart working labs, good lab assistants, water filters, hygienic toilets, Wi-Fi, and rest rooms. The hostel facilities are not good. The food available in the mess is not worth it. Games, sports, and gym facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: If you are interested in fisheries related studies, opt for KUFOS.
reviews.review_text: There are two campuses, and one of them is the Lakeside campus with instructional farms and hatchery. The library has Wi-Fi support. The hostel is very good, and the hostel fee is feasible. The mess provides very good food rather than other government hostels. There is a canteen with a few facilities. Sports, games and a swimming pool are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with adequate infrastructure facilities than many fisheries colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good, with washing machines, toilets, and spacious rooms. Sports and games were also part of day-to-day activities. The mess food was okay but could have been better. Students ran the mess, and it was cheap and affordable at Rs.2500 a month, with weekly 2 days nonveg.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Kaviyattu College of EducationReviewed on 22 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placement .
reviews.review_text: Separate hostel facilities for gender-specific is available and we have medical help present there is a sports area in good condition and we also have good mess food. The computer labs have Wi-Fi connectivity and we have a very big library and the classrooms are also in good condition.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Fathima Memorial Training College, MylaporeReviewed on 5 Dec 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: -The hostels were clean daily and are quite spacious you get rooms with attached washrooms. The food is also available in a mess and it's hygienic and has both vegetarian and non-vegetarian preference options available. There is also a library on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Nursing Kannur Medical CollegeReviewed on 19 May 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Nice college, good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well facilitated. Labs are available for each subject. The library is available in each department. College Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is well facilitated with an attached bathroom. Each room can accommodate four students.

admission_process.title: Guru Nanak University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Guru Nanak University admission processincludes application, selection and admission confirmation. The process starts with the submission of an application form, followed by selection rounds. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
Guru Nanak University Application Process 2026

Aspirants can fill out the admission enquiry form for their query. The admission team then reaches out to the candidates. Aspirants can apply for GNUCET online and pay the application fees. The application process is conducted in online and offline modes. Candidates can also collect the form in-person from the campus.
Once the application window is closed. Applicants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or GNUCET scores. Aspirants also need to meet the eligibility criteria for admission.
Admission Confirmation
Applicants who get shortlisted in the selection round are called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to payGuru Nanak University feesto lock the final seat.
Download:GNU Hyderabad Prospectus

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and the environment are really good and amazing. Overall my experience is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure, labs, classrooms, library are cool and good. It gives a real good experience. The college hostel provides different kinds of items for those who are in college hostel with good quality. The sports we have are cricket, volleyball, basketball, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is excellent. The campus consists of everything that students need.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent, and the library consists of 40,000 books. Hostel food is also good. The campus consists of 2 grounds and one indoor games place called Gametron. We have a university team, and sports fests are also conducted grandly yearly twice. The campus has 4 canteens.

reviews.review_heading: I have satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: About facilities we have Wi-Fi but it has poor connections. So we don't use Wi-Fi much from the college. About labs and library, we have well. Classrooms are very good. We have AC and digital. About canteen and mess according to canteen, the food is very nice. But about the hostel mess, the food we can't eat.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studying, well secured.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not good. Course infrastructure is good. Hostel is not good for the students, I think, because of food. That's why I am not joined in hostel. But some good things are there like gym, football ground, cricket ground, basketball ground. Hostel rooms are very good.

highlights.summary: The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for University of Kashmir, North Campus admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    North Campus, University of Kashmir has been rated 3.5 on placements.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at North Campus, University of Kashmir?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: University of Kashmir, North Campus offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, University of Kashmir, North Campus offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. University of Kashmir, North Campus fee structure for all the courses is around INR 9,998 to 40,600.

faqs.answer: A:    North Campus, University of Kashmir has courses such as M.A., MBA/PGDM, MCA, Ph.D., B.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Humanities & Social Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Science, Engineering. North Campus, University of Kashmir has specializations such as M.A. specializations in English, Ph.D. specializations in Computer Science, English, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by North Campus, University of Kashmir?

faqs.answer: A:    North Campus, University of Kashmir offers Degree courses including 1 UG and 3 PG courses. Additionally, it also has Doctorate courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Seats intake availability for these courses at North Campus, University of Kashmir goes up to 246.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Please do not go to this college; you will regret it.

review_content.Placements: The placement of North Campus is not good, and there is no proper placement in our college. Our placement cell is not good, and companies like Saras Analytical come to our college, but hire no one. As I talked to seniors, they were just not interested in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Don't talk about the infrastructure; the infrastructure is not good. Only one building has three classrooms, and the classrooms are good, with two ACs in each class and proper technology. But the labs are below average, with old PCs that have no power and are not capable of running basic software.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: If I talk about faculty, it is good, but other things are not as good, for example, placements.

review_content.Placements: There are not many options for placement. If you are thinking you will get a placement in a big industry, there are limitations. If you want a good placement, you should go to a big university. If you are a top student, you still have chances at Kashmir University.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are average. You should visit and see the hostels yourself. If you think they are good. Then they are, as people have different perspectives. In my view, they are good for a normal student who focuses only on studies.

review_summary.college_name: University of Kashmir, North Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: An enriching college experience with knowledgeable faculty.

content.Placements: The on-campus placement drive doesn’t usually happen. The job opportunities provided in the on-campus placement drive are very low. Students usually go for off-campus placements. Many seniors have opted for jobs in off-campus placements only. There is not any known rate for the placements of the passouts through this college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and labs are well maintained with new generation computers. The hostel facilities are also available for the students from far-flung areas. Also, there is a canteen and a dispensary for the students inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very bad place to complete your graduation because of the lacking faculty and opportunities.

content.Placements: The university does not have a placement cell, and no companies come to campus for on-campus placements. As a result, there are zero placements, and no students have received high or low packages.
content.Infrastructure: The engineering department is a two-story building with four classrooms and two computer labs. Each classroom has air conditioning and a projector for digital demonstrations. The library is well stocked with the books required for the courses offered on campus. Water filters are provided in every building. The hostel is located about 3 kilometers from the campus and is accessible by a dedicated bus route. The hostel mess is run by students, and the food and cooking areas are hygienic. Unfortunately, there is no Wi-Fi on campus or in the hostel, and the internet connectivity in the area is poor. Finally, there is an on-site general physician, but no sports are played on campus because there is no playground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Please do not go to this college; you will regret it.

content.Placements: The placement of North Campus is not good, and there is no proper placement in our college. Our placement cell is not good, and companies like Saras Analytical come to our college, but hire no one. As I talked to seniors, they were just not interested in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Don't talk about the infrastructure; the infrastructure is not good. Only one building has three classrooms, and the classrooms are good, with two ACs in each class and proper technology. But the labs are below average, with old PCs that have no power and are not capable of running basic software.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: If I talk about faculty, it is good, but other things are not as good, for example, placements.

content.Placements: There are not many options for placement. If you are thinking you will get a placement in a big industry, there are limitations. If you want a good placement, you should go to a big university. If you are a top student, you still have chances at Kashmir University.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are average. You should visit and see the hostels yourself. If you think they are good. Then they are, as people have different perspectives. In my view, they are good for a normal student who focuses only on studies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Computer Science & Engineering) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good university but lacks a bit in infrastructure.

content.Placements: Very low placements takes place in this campus. You majorly have to do other courses along with it to get a job directly after B.Teach. Because placements are very low these years and do not expect it to get back to normal so its better to do some courses.
content.Infrastructure: Department is good enough for studies and enjoyment. Not that big but sufficient. Three labs are there for each subject. These labs are used from your first sem directly so that you get practical knowledge as well and teachers are also great minded they will help you always.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: We are satisfied with our placement, but I didn't attend college.

content.Placements: Our college is providing placements in multiple MNCs and other industries also including mechanical, electrical, and other engineering industries. The average package is 2 LPA to 7 LPA. The present students of our college are working in many industries inside and outside of the state.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good, also girls' hostels and boys' hostels are available on the college campus. Wi-Fi facility is available in hostel. Good food is provided by college canteen. Lab rooms are good. All necessary needs are fulfilled by our college and college management. College management is good, classrooms and other rooms are clean properly maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good for every needy student who can't afford high price colleges for their study.

content.Placements: I am a student. In my college minimum of 60% of students get placed in many companies. The highest package till now is 25 LPA and the medium is 12 LPA. The minimum package is 4.5 LPA. Companies like Bajaj, TCS, etc., recruit from our college. Some get interned in some companies. The roles that are offered in my course are software developer, bug tester, frontend, and backend developer, webpage designer, editor, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi labs and everything available. Hostel is good and comfortable. Canteen and playground are good. The buildings are great and in a good position. Students can stay here in a friendly atmosphere. The crowd near the college is less.
