admission_process.title: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management's course admissionis a mix of merit and entrance-based. Students seeking to get into any of the offered courses are required to meet the preset admission criteria of the desired course. Those seeking to get into the UG courses must have passed Class 12 or equivalent with relevant subjects. Similarly, for PG admissions, candidates need to have passed a graduation in the relevant field. The institute accepts several national and state-level entrances, such as GATE, WBJEE, MAT, etc. Students can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularBITM courses:

The admission procedure for BITM-Bengal Institute of Technology and Management involves several steps, such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students need to apply for the course of choice by filling out the application form. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepBITM admission processexplained below:
Step 1: BITM Application Process

The institute accepts offline applications. Interested candidates can download the application form available on the institute’s website and submit it to the college campus along with the required documents.
Step 2: BITM Selection Process

BITM shortlists candidates based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores, GDPI performance, academic merit, etc. For courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., admission is entrance-based. Whereas, for the other courses, students are selected based on their academic merit. Additionally, the institute also reserves a certain number of seats for direct admissions.
Step 3: BITM Admission Confirmation
To confirm the admission, students are required to pay theBITM admission fees.

B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering
courses_data.description: BITM - Bengal Institute of Technology and Management offers aBTechprogramme to the students. This programme is offered in various specialisations, such as Electrical Engineering,Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology,Mechanical Engineering, and Instrumentation Technology, among others. Admission to the course is based on the candidate’s performance in the WBJEE and JEE Main. Additionally, students can also get lateral entry into the second year of the course. For this, students, need to appear for the CEE for lateral admission conducted byJELET, West Bengal.

faqs.question: Does Bengal Institute of Technology and Management offer lateral admissions for BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bengal Institute of Technology and Management indeed offers lateral admissions for its BTech course. Students seeking to enrol in the second year of the BTech are accepted through the Lateral Entry Scheme. Students need to appear for the Common Entrance Examination conducted by WBJEE under the Lateral Entry Scheme (JELET) or 50% in overall semester for direct admission. Students can reach out to the admission help desk of the institute for any queries.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Bengal Institute of Technology and Management BTech?
faqs.answer: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management BTech admission is entrance-based. Students seeking to get into this course need to pass Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry/Biotechnology/Biology as optional subjects. Additionally, candidates need to provide a valid score of either WBJEE or JEE Mains.

faqs.question: Does Bengal Institute of Technology and Management accepts admission through JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, JEE Main scores are accepted by Bengal Institute of Technology and Management for BTech admissions. Candidates with valid JEE Main scores and 45% in Class 12 can apply. Admission is done based on the institute's own merit list. JEE Main-passed students have an alternative to WBJEE for securing admission in BTech.

reviews.review_heading: We are satisfied with our placement, but I didn't attend college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good, also girls' hostels and boys' hostels are available on the college campus. Wi-Fi facility is available in hostel. Good food is provided by college canteen. Lab rooms are good. All necessary needs are fulfilled by our college and college management.  College management is good, classrooms and other rooms are clean properly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Good for every needy student who can't afford high price colleges for their study.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi labs and everything available. Hostel is good and comfortable. Canteen and playground are good. The buildings are great and in a good position. Students can stay here in a friendly atmosphere. The crowd near the college is less.

reviews.review_heading: The college had good infrastructure but lab equipment is too old to work.
reviews.review_text: Quality of the campus is very good. There are so many trees and the environment of studying is good. It has huge library. Quality of food is good and also very affordable. Teachers are very helpful. The campus has a huge playground but after lockdown it is not suitable for play.

reviews.review_heading: Above Average the college review for me.
reviews.review_text: Totally Wi-Fi campus with digital classroom and college contains central library from where we get all our needy books. College also have hostel facility for both boys and girls. In this campus central cafeteria is there quality of food is much better, big playground and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory experience and value for money.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is huge and green but requires some renovation. There is a girls hostel inside the campus which is quite good but the boys hostel is not worth the money. It is suggested for boys to live in a mess or PG. The college provides all the facilities in the girls hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Best Engineering College in the Environment of Santiniketan.
reviews.review_text: Our college premises are very green. The area is very big and open environment. There are many facilites are available like library with lots of books, good and reasonable canteen. Our teachers are very helpful and supportive for every reason. Classrooms are very clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi also available. Also there are well equipped labrotories for every stream.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bengal Institute of Technology and Management, Santiniketan.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities and infrastructure are available in our college. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. A good quality library and big playground are available there. The hostel is good. The hostel facilities are awesome. All types of sports and medical facilities are available. The food quality is good in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your time and money here.
reviews.review_text: I have never seen such a hostel till now. The rooms are good, but the bathrooms are unhygienic with no proper doors. Wi-Fi doesn't work. Food is also not up to the mark. I'll never recommend this hostel to anyone. I have never seen such labs even. The labs in my school were well-maintained and better than here. There are water leakages. Machines don't work well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BITM - Bengal Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: The positive thing is the college's location is just near the main road. In the case of technical college, we see that the college is far from the locality. The transport facilities are not good, but in the case of my college, it was good. In the hostel, there are facilities as a student needs to live normally. It has a good room with good space, different beds for each student, and a study table too. The hostel also provides a high-speed Wi-Fi connection with 4 routers on each floor, so every s...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides just good placements but not very good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are also good, and it provides more advantages to us. But there are also some disadvantages to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am very glad to be a part of this college.
reviews.review_text: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management has built its infrastructure in the heritage of Bolpur city. The campus is lush green and eco-friendly. It has a park and historical buildings. The campus is huge. The college fee structure is affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bengal Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the institute is really awesome. The campus is spread over sprawling 24 acres of land in the heart of Shantiniketan city. There are hostels, canteens, ATM facility, stationery shop, photocopy shop, and much more on the campus. The security at the campus is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm very satisfied with this college because of its faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Every department has its own building. Hostels for both boys and girls are available on the campus. The administration building, library building, and examination cell are also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the overall management of the college and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure wise, the college is just average. Classrooms, library and other necessary infrastructure need a lot of improvement. This again is the task of the management to address. The management should provide Wi-FI facility on campus, and most importantly the connection has to be taken from good service providers. Hostel facilities were the worst in this college, and students faced a lot of problems as the boys' hostel was situated outside the college in a remote place. Laboratory faciliti...

reviews.review_heading: The best college for freshers.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the infrastructure is very high, and If you look at the history of our college, you can see that our college already has the best industrial award in West Bengal. So its clear that it has updated instruments and machines. The college is good for diploma students because they are going to be taught by highly qualified teachers who teach B.Tech students.

Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).

45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.

content.Placements: 70 percent of the CSE students are placed in your course. Top recruiting companies for our courses are Infosys, Amazon, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant are some of the companies. Top roles offered in our course are system engineer, software engineer, data analyst are some of the roles.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are available for our course department, they provide a good Wi-Fi whenever we need coding challenges, during projects, problem-solving, and many other competitions. The facilities of the hostel rooms are very clean, and quality food is available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted daily.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with our college. Placements are good.

content.Placements: 70 percent of the students are placed in our course. The highest package offered is 44LPA and the lowest package is 3LPA. The average package offered is 7LPA. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, Accenture, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, TCS, and NatWest. 30 percent of the students got internship from our course in the NATWEST company.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are very good but some systems do not work. Some labs are good Wi-Fi is also available, we can use it whenever needed for college purposes. Classrooms and the library are also very neat and silent books are available whatever we need, they are available and we can use them wisely if we want.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with my college experience, and it's really good.

content.Placements: The 2026 students of my college, my seniors, are not placed in good positions, only some people got the jobs. My class girls are selected for the internship with a 50k per month stipend at NatWest. The top roles are CSE and tier sub-branches. My college is very nice, and I am very happy.
content.Infrastructure: The class are good, and the labs are also good. In our college, the phone signal is very poor. The college also does not provide any Wi-Fi connection to the students. My college infrastructure is very nice, and I loved my college a lot. It is a very good college, and we enjoyed it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A short note about my college.

content.Placements: I had done Electronics and Communication Engineering at Vignan's Institute of Engineering for Women. The highest package is 13 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cognizant, Accenture, Infosys, etc. The percentage of getting an internship is low, but the percentage of providing an online internship is high.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is super cool and good with different environments. The hostel environment is also very good. Rooms are well organized with attached bathrooms and cupboards. Facilities include Wi-Fi, mineral water, hot water, and indoor games. Food served is hygienic in the mess with a weekly menu from students' input.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The beauty of Vignan Institute of Engineering for Women.

content.Placements: In my college, 50 percent of students got placements. They also offered internships, which we can do either in our college or outside the college. We got placements for companies like Synergies, TCS, Infosys, and so on. Every student who graduated from this college was either studying M.Tech or doing a job.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms were very neat and clean. We also have Wi-Fi facilities in the corridors. There was also a library where the students could learn from the textbooks in their free time. We also had a hostel. The medical facilities and the canteen were good.

individual_reviews.title: Average engineering college .

content.Placements: Placement is poor. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 2-4 LPA. Only students from CSE & ETE get on-campus placements. Around maybe 20% of students get placements. Many students also get internships and contractual jobs. There are a few startups also from our college, and many students pursue higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is below average but good according to the location. Some equipment is not in working condition in the lab. Classrooms are okay. The library is small. Top recruiters are Airtel, Infosys, TCS, Byju's, etc. 100% of students got internships from my course. The top roles offered in the course are GET, Engineer, Subject Matter Expert, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very modern classrooms, a well-maintained library, and labs as well. Wi-Fi facilities are available inside the campus. There are two hostels: one is a boys' hostel and the other is a girls' hostel. The seat capacity is 80 in each hostel. A canteen is available inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: One among the top 10 college.

content.Placements: 75% to 85% 4 LPA to 12 LPA Infosys, Mahindra, Wipro, and many other companies 90% in Tata Company; many companies from different states offer placements every year; students apply and get jobs 80% of students got internships in companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also good. Hostel infrastructure is excellent. All food is available in the canteen and hostel canteen. Laboratories in college departments are all set and have medical facilities with an ambulance. Sports weeks are also conducted during fest sessions.

paragraphs: Barak Valley Engineering College admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 4 programmes.Barak Valley Engineering Collegeoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. Barak Valley Engineering College admission is done based on scores of exams like JEE Main, Assam CEE, and JEE Advanced. The university offers over 4 courses at UG level in field, such as Engineering. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.E. / B.Tech programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 4 years programme.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. hostel_campus.college_name: Barak Valley Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average engineering college .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is below average but good according to the location. Some equipment is not in working condition in the lab. Classrooms are okay. The library is small. There is only 1 hostel for boys, so maximum students stay outside the campus. Medical facilities are not good enough.

reviews.review_heading: It's an amazing college. I have amazing memories and experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. All branches have different buildings and individual labs and lab equipment is also working; the library is small and has multiple classrooms. There are three hostels: one for boys and the other two for girls and food is also good, but the mess is private, meaning contractual so there are some difficulties but if students manage the mess, it will improve.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college is huge, with decent classrooms with neat and clean premises and bathrooms. The auditorium is huge with projectors and air conditioning. The canteen serves good and tasty snacks. The hostel is spacious, with security guards at the main gate.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at BVEC, Karimganj.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very modern classrooms, a well-maintained library, and labs as well. Wi-Fi facilities are available inside the campus. There are two hostels: one is a boys' hostel and the other is a girls' hostel. The seat capacity is 80 in each hostel. A canteen is available inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: One among the top 10 college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good. Hostel infrastructure is excellent. All food is available in the canteen and hostel canteen. Laboratories in college departments are all set and have medical facilities with an ambulance. Sports weeks are also conducted during fest sessions.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Barak Valley Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. The infrastructure is better. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are better. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good but the WIFI connection is not good enough. Labs have sufficient number of computers. You will find necessary books for the subjects in the library. Classrooms provide good environment to study. Hostel facilities are good but the quality of the food in the mess needs to improve. The quality of the food provided by the canteen is nice.

reviews.review_heading: It needs improvement as it lacks facilities like other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but still lacks some decent daily requirements like water in bathrooms, drinking water for the students, electricity, and cleanliness. There is no rest area for students in between classes, and most of the classrooms are empty with no chairs and bench.

reviews.review_heading: I'm partially satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but it doesn't work. Labs in this college are fine but not up to the mark. Classrooms are also fine. There is also a small Library in this college but with fewer books. There are only 2 hostels, one for boys and one for girls. Due to the fewer seats in Hostel, many students stays in PG's. The food quality of the Mess is quite good and in the canteen it's superb.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is very beautiful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The accommodation and food are good. The local traditional food is served. Wi-Fi is also available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: It is a developing college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi, a workshop room, a library, physics and computer labs, a computer lab, a seminar room, and a canteen. The quality of the food served in the hostel mess is average. It can be rated 8 out of 10. Indoor games and athletes are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely not satisfied with the labs and equipment.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is decent, but it doesn't have a proper field for sports activities. Games such as cricket, football, etc., are played near college fields surrounded by a river. Proper boundaries are needed, otherwise, it's a good college.

highlights.summary: Lalita Vidya Pratishthanam, Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth is an institute. Lalita Vidya Pratishthanam, Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 20 courses at UG and PG levels in 9 specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Business Analytics, Computer Science Engineering, Cyber Security and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA, B.A. and BBA in Full Time mode. Lalita Vidya Pratishthanam, Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,80,000 to 10,00,000. Lalita Vidya Pratishthanam, Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth has an annual seat intake of 750 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Humanities & Social Sciences and Teaching & Education. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

review_content.Placements: The total strength of my class is 22. This is high compared to last year’s strength. I do not know about placements as I have only joined recently. I think we will be sent to government schools for internships and other activities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very hygienic. They provide necessary facilities for students. There are facilities like washing machines, elevators, and vending machines. Wi-Fi is also provided till midnight. Study tables and lamps are available for studying purposes.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the college, taking this college to complete the course was a good decisio

review_content.Placements: I am from the CSE batch S1, and around 85% of students were placed. The highest package was good, with IBM, Nvidia, and Tata being the top recruiters of the college. Many students got internships, and roles offered included developer and analyst positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has good Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms and a library with updated resources. Hostel facilities are decent, the mess and canteen food is average, medical support is available on campus, and sports facilities are well-maintained.

content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very hygienic. They provide necessary facilities for students. There are facilities like washing machines, elevators, and vending machines. Wi-Fi is also provided till midnight. Study tables and lamps are available for studying purposes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college, taking this college to complete the course was a good decisio

content.Placements: I am from the CSE batch S1, and around 85% of students were placed. The highest package was good, with IBM, Nvidia, and Tata being the top recruiters of the college. Many students got internships, and roles offered included developer and analyst positions.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has good Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms and a library with updated resources. Hostel facilities are decent, the mess and canteen food is average, medical support is available on campus, and sports facilities are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely, now I am enjoying my life at Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth.

content.Placements: Above 70 to 90 per cent of students are placed in the course. 10 LPA is the lowest package, 38 LPA is the highest package, and the average package is offered above 22 LPA. India's and worldwide top recruiting companies like EY, IBM, TCS, JIO, etc recruit. About 40% of students in my senior section course got internships in IBM, 10% got internships in TCS, 14% of students got internships in Jio, and about 22% got internship jobs at EY.
content.Infrastructure: The Chellaram academic block building is fully air-conditioned, provides ultra-modern labs with good equipment, a library, high-speed free Wi-Fi and smart and highly facilitated classrooms. The hostel is a newly constructed building, and every room is furnished with new furniture. And have sports courts of badminton, cricket, kho-kho, football, basketball, etc. The mess provides healthy and tasty vegetarian foods.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good facilities and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides a very good environment to study and also relatively good space. Faculty and the staff are very friendly. The college has well-kept infrastructure to support academics and curricular activities. The classrooms are spacious with proper ventilation and modern teaching aids such as projectors, smart boards, and dedicated departmental laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: College experience: Learning, growth & vibes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The classrooms are neat, the campus is well-maintained, and all the facilities, like the library, labs, and common areas are updated and super student-friendly. Everything feels organized and comfortable which makes studying way

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lalita Vidya Pratishthanam, Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very hygienic. They provide necessary facilities for students. There are facilities like washing machines, elevators, and vending machines. Wi-Fi is also provided till midnight. Study tables and lamps are available for studying purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college, taking this college to complete the course was a good decisio
reviews.review_text: Our department has good Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms and a library with updated resources. Hostel facilities are decent, the mess and canteen food is average, medical support is available on campus, and sports facilities are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, now I am enjoying my life at Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth.
reviews.review_text: The Chellaram academic block building is fully air-conditioned, provides ultra-modern labs with good equipment, a library, high-speed free Wi-Fi and smart and highly facilitated classrooms. The hostel is a newly constructed building, and every room is furnished with new furniture. And have sports courts of badminton, cricket, kho-kho, football, basketball, etc. The mess provides healthy and tasty vegetarian foods.

reviews.review_heading: A modern university, but there are a lot of restrictions.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides very good facilities and has better infrastructure, and also has a gym and sports ground in several places. The Wi-Fi connection is weak sometimes, especially in the rainy season, and there's a mini ambulance in case of any medical emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the year 2027.
reviews.review_text: There are well-equipped labs for specialised subjects and a comprehensive library with both physical and digital resources, and high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus. Well-maintained, clean, and provide basic amenities like cupboards and Wi-Fi. High-quality food, with a variety of vegetarian options. They have a spacious sports ground with facilities for games like cricket, football, and other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Best campus experience with vibrant events.
reviews.review_text: The college offers well-equipped labs and a smart classroom. They provide a strong Wi-Fi and an excellent library system. Spacious classroom and dedicated space for sports. Overall the campus is clean, organised, and thoughtfully designed to ensure a good experience.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. Classrooms are high tech. Labs and library have AC. Mess food is bad. Canteen snacks are tasty but it is a little more costly. Free Wi-fi in all classrooms. Many sports items. There are many clubs for programmes.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely happy to study at Chinmaya.
reviews.review_text: Chinmaya has very good labs and classrooms. It also has Wi-Fi facility. The atmosphere there is suitable for all kinds of studies. Students studying there will also benefit from it. When a great environment and a great learning method come together, it creates wonders.

reviews.review_heading: One of the most worth full universities in Kerala and in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure which the college is providing is unbelievable, something we may not have expected before joining the college. This is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is really good. It is well-maintained, clean, and provides a comfortable environment for students to stay and study.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college ever. They behave very rudely.
reviews.review_text: The food is not good and unhygienic. The hostel facilities are good. The staff here is very bad. They are involved in improper behavior. The medical room is not working properly without proper equipment and medicine. Sports activities are conducted but without any proper preparation.

reviews.review_heading: The college is actually good, but they want to improve many things.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Chinmaya Vishwa Vidyapeeth is good, but the construction is not yet finished and is still progressing. It may take around 1 to 2 years for the construction to be completed, and the infrastructure may become better. The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are very good now, and in the future, it will get high-tech.

reviews.review_heading: An Average and Facilitated College in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: The university offers a variety of relevant courses for the modern world, like data science, robotics, machine learning, and a lot more. The university hostel inside the campus can accommodate about 450 students, and the university also has 2 hostels outside the campus. The university also arranges PG facilities for students in collaboration with a catering company. Chellaram Block on the campus has 3 fully functioning computer labs, a chemistry lab, and other facilities. 60-seat-wide classroom...

individual_reviews.title: Overall a good college with a nice atmosphere.

content.Placements: Our college has an average placement rate now. The average package is around 4 LP. Amazon, IBM, Infosys, TCS etc companies came to our college and recruited students. The students go to internships in various companies, which are good companies. Overall a nice placement rate.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good labs for each department, and the classrooms are good having projectors and a good atmosphere. We have two libraries digital and non digital. They are so good that they have Wi-Fi support in every lab. We have very good sports and games availability.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A very good college but needs improvement.

content.Placements: I think the college has placements that are good but not that great. Only about 20 people get placed from the CS batches, which consist of almost 180 students, averaging 60 students per class. IBM, Bosch, and some other companies are present for the placement. Overall, average placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college-provided hostel seats are limited; not everyone can get a place in the hostel. Another important detail is that the college doesn't provide hostel facilities to girls from the second year, only first-year girls have college hostel facility. The service in the college girls’ hostel is very bad. Boys’ hostel experience is average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college with a nice atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good labs for each department, and the classrooms are good having projectors and a good atmosphere. We have two libraries digital and non digital. They are so good that they have Wi-Fi support in every lab. We have very good sports and games availability.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college but needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The college-provided hostel seats are limited; not everyone can get a place in the hostel. Another important detail is that the college doesn't provide hostel facilities to girls from the second year, only first-year girls have college hostel facility. The service in the college girls’ hostel is very bad. Boys’ hostel experience is average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hostel infrastructure are good. Hostel food is also good. For EEE, there are more than 2 labs. It has a W-iFi support. Classrooms and atmosphere are very good and fully satisfying. Libraries have plenty of book collections. It also has a digital library.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure and hostel are really good. Hostel food is also good, and for EC, there are more than 2 labs and Wi-Fi support. Classroom and atmosphere are very good, fully satisfied. Libraries have plenty of book collections and also a digital library available.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in ihrd.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with basic equipment, and labs and library are high-tech. The library has printers, so we can't go outside for printing. Labs are equipped with all materials required, and there are many computer labs, and electronic devices and equipment are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Building future leaders: My experience at College of Engineering, Adoor.
reviews.review_text: We have one of the best labs among all colleges. Free Wi-Fi facilities are available in labs, classrooms, etc. Hostels are coordinated by the Parents Teaching Association, providing the best facilities to students. There are 2 separate libraries with thousands of books from each department.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college with good facilities, atmosphere, etc.
reviews.review_text: Our mechanical department has NBA accreditation and a very nice lab and classrooms. We have two libraries, digital and book libraries and have Wi-Fi support also. Our hostel is near the college, just 5 minutes away, and the food is also good. Moreover, everything is fine.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college, and I recommend everyone to join.
reviews.review_text: The college lab is very good, I will give five stars. The lab assistants are so helpful, and the facilities are even good. Hostel is very nice, good food, atmosphere, etc. College canteen is very nice and has a cafeteria too. Our college participates in sports very well and provides good support for sports and arts.

reviews.review_heading: College of Engineering Adoor: Excellence in Learning.
reviews.review_text: CEA has good infrastructure with spacious classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer centers, Wi-Fi, seminar halls, hostels, a library, and playgrounds. They provide a supportive campus environment for academics and activities. It has good hostel and food facilities. We have a good hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overrated course of an overrated college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is in pathetic condition. It looks like it has not been maintained for a long time. College has an old and damaged appearance. On mechanical block most of the tiles on the floor are broken due to mismanagement of the college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in this college is very small and narrow. Photos on Google are misleading. Labs are very congested. Toilets are hygienic and smelly. There are poor instruments and furnitures. Dogs are everywhere including college building is covered with moss.

reviews.review_heading: The most underrated college in the world.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure and other facilities compared with other colleges. It has good and well-established classrooms, it has a canteen which provides good and excellent food which is prepared hygienically. The hostel food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The overhyped curriculum and engineering field in College of Engineering, Adoor.
reviews.review_text: College has a good library and good infrastructure but they don't have facility to take advantage of this infrastructure. Facilities aren't in such good condition. I still don't know what's going on class. They have good canteen, classrooms, etc., but the quality of sports facilities is limited.

reviews.review_heading: The average college in my words.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are digitalized. It has a good library. There is Wi-Fi but it is only for faculty members. But the classrooms don't have any air holes. College canteen provides good and hygienic food every day. I don't know anything about medical facilities. But for sports and other facilities are very limited.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities aren't good enough.
reviews.review_text: The college has good, smart classrooms. It has a good library which consists of a large number of books. The hostel provides delicious, tasty, healthy, and hygienic food. It does not have a good sports ground and no other facilities. It is overrated for such things.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I'm a 2nd-year student pursuing B.Teach from S.D. College of Engineering and Technology in the IT branch. Many more students are pursuing their B.Teach from the IT branch. The highest package offered in my course is around 6 Lacs. The lowest package offered in my course is around 3 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Infosys, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a library for students. Sports and games facilities are very good. There is a ground for sports. A skating area and shooting area are separately made for the students. Very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Muzaffarnagar, The worst engineering college.

content.Placements: There is no placement in this college. Don't take admission; no company will come to the college because their market value is too low. This college doesn't have the facilities of labs and other necessary resources. They have educated faculty members, but they lack knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Very bad infrastructure. The college doesn't have proper drinking arrangements. You can imagine how worse this is. The government should shut down such types of colleges. They also commit scholarship fraud with students. They don't have basic materials like cement in the civil labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements and I would recommend joining this college.

content.Placements: Almost 80-90% of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered ranges between 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Samsung, Google, Godrej, etc.

individual_reviews.title: You can join our college to get better placements and have a successful future.

individual_reviews.title: The college has good faculty members and decent placements.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in our college. Companies like TCS, Wipro and Q-spider came to our campus, and they provided the salary package of up to 7 LPA. Students get help from the college regarding placements, and nearly all academically average and above-average students end up having a job after the completion of their degree.

Fully automated central library comprises of e-journals and e-books

hostel.description: Hostel facilities include internet and wi-fi connection, 24 hours power backup, indoor games etc

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a library for students. Sports and games facilities are very good. There is a ground for sports. A skating area and shooting area are separately made for the students. Very good.

reviews.review_heading: Muzaffarnagar, The worst engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Very bad infrastructure. The college doesn't have proper drinking arrangements. You can imagine how worse this is. The government should shut down such types of colleges. They also commit scholarship fraud with students. They don't have basic materials like cement in the civil labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious with well-ventilated systems and equipped with digital projectors for presentation. A huge library is available for students. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. Food delivery is available.

reviews.review_heading: You can join our college to get better placements and have a successful future.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms were huge and well-ventilated. There was also a huge library with all the latest books. The canteen and mess facilities were also good. They served a variety of tasty food items at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is quite good. The college campus is not that big, but it works. We have many computer labs with free Wi-Fi and well-furnished classrooms. The cafeteria provides good quality food, and the hostel mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who want to do UG living nearby college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well and facilities are average. Hostel facilities are average. Canteen and mess is good but no sport and games facilities are present basically the college is more like school. The college is good for the local students whom resites nearby college in muzaffarnagar city.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of the facilities provided in the college and teachers also.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms here are moderate, and there is no Wi-Fi facility. The librarian doesn't allow students to study in the library, and labs are not up to the mark. It is not a residential college, so there are no hostels. There are no medical facilities, sports and games. The canteen is available here only for namesake. Director is the worst in this college, and the head of the college doesn't know anything about the course. So, you can't expect anything.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in studies, but average in other activities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. Facilities provided by the college is good. There is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus, labs and classroom are good, the library is not too good. Hostel facilities are average, and there are 24 hours of water and electricity in the hostel. Mess food is good, and cleaning facility is also average.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms are great enough to accommodate almost 60 students. The floor has tile, and the walls are painted well.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure in this college is good, and the rest is bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was more than good. Classrooms were clean and well-maintained. Till 2013, the college hasn't provided any Wi-Fi facility. The library was very good, and books related to all courses were available. If a particular book were not available, the librarian would make it available in the given time. All the equipment was available for course-related experiments, and the equipment functioned well and was well-maintained. But there were no sports and games related area...

reviews.review_heading: The college with a hygienic infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: When I have attended my first lecture at the college, I was amazed at the simple but beautiful and hygienic infrastructure. The labs are good and equipped with all necessary technology. The classrooms are average with the traditional environment.  The smart and digital methods are not provided. The canteen is not that good. The classrooms are equipped with bulbs which is disappointing.

reviews.review_heading: I had both good and bad experiences here.
reviews.review_text: The college looks attractive, but the classrooms aren't well-equipped with modern technologies. Labs in the computer science department are fine. The library is renovated recently, and I must say it is a great place. Extracurricular activities are conducted every alternative weekend, but the low participation from students disappoints our college management.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: There are many classrooms available in our college. Some are air-conditioned, and some classrooms are equipped with projectors. There is separate administration block available on the campus. There are separate conference rooms available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am moderately satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Labs are well-equipped, and the other facilities like library and canteen are also good as well. The college has well-designed infrastructure when compared with other colleges in the same region. The campus is huge and well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I just want to say it is a great college in Muzaffarnagar.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very beautiful infrastructure. When I entered my college, I was very happy after seeing the infrastructure of my college. I was very happy after getting admission in S D College of Engineering and Technology. It was a golden time of my life in this college.

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for BIT Institute of Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    BIT Institute of Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 6 UG and 2 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. BIT Institute of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, UG Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.

review_summary.college_name: BIT Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college because of its facilities, faculty members, and placements.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students are placed in our course. Recruiting companies are Wipro, MU Sigma, CISCO, VMWare, Redhat, Drupal, etc. Almost 50-60% of students get internships. Software developer and data base administrator roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Each section of students has separate classrooms and facilities. Classrooms are well furnished and ventilated. Audio visual room is provided with all teaching aids, like OHP, slide projector, television, video player, LCD projector, video camera, still camera, DVD, multimedia computer, audio systems, microscopic projector, etc., to ensure the overall development of students. Students have all facilities for games and sports. Wi-Fi, laboratory, technical workshop, and library are available in this college. The food quality is good, and there is no mess in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for local people.

content.Placements: Learning is based on yourself, and faculty members here provide their knowledge up to a peak level. There will be students who have a high academic percentage also. Many students joined many companies after choosing courses based on their interested domains. The college is the best.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good here, and the hostel is also fine. Our college has a lot of buildings for the laboratory. Classrooms are also good, and sitting benches are a little bit uncomfortable. The library has a lot of books, and it helps a lot of students.

content.Placements: More than 30 percent of students were placed in my course The highest package of offered in my course is 300k per annum The lowest package of offered in my course is 180k per annum Top recruiting companies is hcl Kia faurasia hundai And more than 10 companies More than 70% of students got internship from my course like kaynes technology Mysore Cisco etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for local people.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is good here, and the hostel is also fine. Our college has a lot of buildings for the laboratory. Classrooms are also good, and sitting benches are a little bit uncomfortable. The library has a lot of books, and it helps a lot of students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of good infrastructure and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A review of BIT Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Though Anantapur has plenty of engineering colleges, there is no engineering college nearby the town. Our college is located 7 km away from Hindupur. Our college is spread over 26.4-acres. The college has hostel facility. The whole college is enabled with CCTV cameras.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are no sports and games facilities. The lab equipment is bad. No Wi-Fi is available. The computers are old ones and run slowly. The labs are not proper. reviews.review_heading: It is an awesome college for education.
reviews.review_text: BIT Institute of Technology is one of the famous colleges in Ananthapuram district. Our college is spread over 59 acres, and 10 acres of ground is available. reviews.review_heading: The college has the good faculty, infrastructure, and the placements.
reviews.review_text: As compared with the other colleges, our college looks like pollution less and also green campus. The labs are provided with many facilities, and the lecturers are friendly, and their way of teaching is good. When compared with the other colleges, our college is the little bit better as of my opinion.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty infrastructure is good and the placements are also good in the past years

In our college labs are good with high configured computers, Library is available with huge amount of books. Wi-Fi is not available for the students. Even mobiles are strictly prohibited in our college.
Hostel is good, Canteen is not that much good and food is not good. Medical facilities are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: You can join in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is computer lab with more than 150 computers and the classrooms are very large the library consists of 30,000 volumes of books the college will conduct the sports on the eve of college day celebrations the food is little bit not good the hostel rooms are okay with 3 members for each room.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in everything with quality education and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Every classroom has separate teaching skills with smart projectors. There are computer labs with almost good teaching of English communication. Every lab is equipped with all equipment and instruments which are useful. Labs are good and safe for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy and loved to did an engineering.
reviews.review_text: My college provides all the possible facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical dispensary's, sports and games. The labs are good with best equipments as well as the classes are also good and cool. The college canteen food is not so good but better. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A good or okay college that is worth the price.

review_content.Placements: During 2021-22, a total of 105 jobs were offered by Tier 1 companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc., to a maximum salary package of 4.6 LPA for the students of GEC Idukki. But be warned that, most companies that visit for placement are usually IT software companies. Mech, EE, or EC companies visit for placements very rarely. So, be prepared to do off-campus placements or look for a position in the software field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Personally, I would say the labs are good. Opinions may vary, but there is enough equipment for everyone (classes are divided into batches to ensure room). It might be old, but these will be replaced during lab exams. As for classrooms, each bench and desk can accommodate 3 to 4 students. The library allows you to borrow books for almost a month, and you can even renew them if you show them in person. I would say that English and Malayalam literary books are less, but study materials are overwhelming.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfactory learning in this college as it provides good learning facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 25% of students were placed from our branch. Even though a university rank holder studied in our college in Electronics and Communication, which is a great achievement. The highest package from our college during 2021-2022 was 4.6 lakhs CTC, and the lowest package was 2 lakhs per annum. The recruiting company that selected more students from our branch compared to other companies during 2022-23 was Coromandel Electronics, Computer Science - Algomox, Information Technology - 6D Technology, and Mechanical - ZF. Also, Mitsogo, Quest, IBS Software, Experion, IBM, etc. GECI provides necessary internship opportunities from different companies. GECI provides different opportunities for the students, making them involved in various study-related programs outside the college.

content.Placements: Here, the placements are very low. CSE is the branch with the most placements in this college. The average salary package is around 5-7 LPA. hostel_campus.college_name: Government Engineering College

reviews.review_heading: If looking for a Government College (last option), and good scenery and a good place (view also).
reviews.review_text: Here, for girls, they have 2 hostels situated near the college (5 meters). But the mess and other basic facilities are much worse there. Also, if you want to buy anything, you must travel around 6-7 km to reach the nearest town. For boys, things are not always certain. It's not near the college. Also, there is no certainty of food in the hostel always. Also, no facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college to study for future.
reviews.review_text: College has full infrastructure facilities. College has good professors. They are well educated. They know how to take care of students, and in teaching, they are well-experienced. College provides a hostel for girls only, which means hostel is under construction. Hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: A good or okay college that is worth the price.
reviews.review_text: Personally, I would say the labs are good. Opinions may vary, but there is enough equipment for everyone (classes are divided into batches to ensure room). It might be old, but these will be replaced during lab exams. As for classrooms, each bench and desk can accommodate 3 to 4 students. The library allows you to borrow books for almost a month, and you can even renew them if you show them in person. I would say that English and Malayalam literary books are less, but study materials are overwhe...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory learning in this college as it provides good learning facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, providing a good learning ambience. Projectors are available. There are labs for practical-related subjects. The Chemistry lab is not highly appreciated but has things that can be used to do some essential experiments. However, electrical, electronics, and computer labs are well-appreciated, providing very good internet facilities, and enough equipment and instruments to do all of our experiments, as these are the labs that engineering students handle more. We have a satisfa...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college and we can adjust it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and buildings are good. The college has a nice scenic view because of the location. The climate is also attractive and the burden of hot temperatures is less. College is active in sports. We have a very good team in games like football, volleyball, basketball, handball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: GECI - An unseen wonder in the middle of the hills.
reviews.review_text: Top-level infrastructure. All the departments have equal priority in construction with additional facilities of Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well constructed with projectors and digital equipment. A well-equipped library is at the heart of the college. The ladies' hostel provides a good and clean mess and accommodation. An affordable range of fees.

reviews.review_heading: An 'above average' in terms of academics and 'below average' in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were good for the amount of ₹10 per day rent. Food was not that good. Facilities like Wi-Fi were provided but might not work for several days or months. Labs were not too bad. Sports were given importance by students, supported by faculty members, but the college ground is an adverse factor.

reviews.review_heading: Limited facilities are there. Good faculty members and nice atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is limited. The lab space is small but does contain all the required equipment. The library is functional and contains a large collection of readings and reference texts. The hostel facilities offered by the campus are limited. Private hostel facilities are available outside campus.

reviews.review_heading: A college with a good climate. Some satisfaction with guest faculty members, but the lacks events.
reviews.review_text: There are well-developed classrooms, a library, two computer labs, and one robotics lab. Wi-Fi is also available. Facilities in hostels are also above average. The quality of the food is also good. Somewhat dissatisfied with the hostel's Wi-Fi and the maintenance of the facilities in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with placements, faculty members, exams, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The girls' hostel available inside the college does not have a proper mess. The boys' hostel is 4 to 5 km away from the college. Labs don't have the proper equipment. Drinking water facility is not provided in the departments.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placements in 2016 and an excellent vibe.
reviews.review_text: For our course, we had enough classrooms and other building facilities. For other departments, we had separate buildings so enough classrooms were available. Wi-Fi was limited to personal use. The speed was good. We had enough computer labs. Except for the final year, we had shared systems for two students. For final-year students, individual systems in labs were available. The hostel facilities were good. Good food was served in the hostel and the college canteen. However, the college hostel wa...

reviews.review_heading: Good vibes are there. There are Mountains, cool climate, Snow and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is poor. Lab and workshop are nice. Thermal engineering lab, machine tools lab, material testing lab, Autocad lab, Lathe machines, petrol, diesel engines are there. Sports meets is held annually. Basketball court, Badminton court and cricket nets are there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, Idukki.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, laboratories, and library are good. The Wi-Fi facility is not available right now. Hostel quality is average, and sports are not good. Medical facilities are very hard to access. The medical health center is 5 KM away from our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college life is good here.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The climate is nice. There are a total of 4 buildings. The main block is for CCF, office, principal office, and mechanical classes. One block is available for mechanical labs and faculty. Another block is for CS and IT. The last block is for ECE and EEE. We can reach all the buildings easily.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty, good placements in 2021, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are smart classrooms. Wi-Fi connection is available with 2mbps speed. A central library is available. There are laboratories for all subjects. Sports and games are a little low. Food is average. Medical facilities are available. Facilities and infrastructure are good.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Lukhdhirji Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: There is a placement cell in our college. As a placement cell student coordinator, I can assure you that if you are a hardworking student, you will surely get placed. Various big companies like Reliance, Adani, and Nirma come on campus. Reliance offers about 8 Lacs per annum, while Adani offers 6 Lacs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a library present in our college and department where you can borrow books. The infrastructure is quite good as it is a government college. There is a hostel available for boys, Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, and there are computer labs and all the essential labs for the course.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements and many laboratories.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50-60% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered ranges from 1.8 LPA to 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Reliance, Suzlon, L&T, etc. Around 55% of students got internships in this course. The top roles offered were design engineer and production manager. We also got a free chance to learn NX from certified members.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories were average. There was a decent library in this college. Hostel facilities were great. The food quality was decent. Mess was average. Sports were conducted on our campus. There were 2-3 volleyball grounds and 1 cricket ground.

admission_process.title: Lukhdhirji Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Lukhdhirji Engineering College admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Lukhdhirji Engineering Collegeoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma and M.E./M.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 3,000 - 6,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good with its faculty members and it is a great place to learn.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are available. It also has a big hostel campus. It also provides a good laboratory. Wi-Fi is enabled with high speed. The library is also better. There are 4 messes. It has an NCC unit of the 2nd Gujarat Battalion.

reviews.review_heading: Our teachers are very helpful and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Many games were available like carrom, chess, badminton, volleyball, cricket, etc. The infrastructure of our campus was very good. All facilities were available like Wi-Fi, computer lab, library, and workshop. Mess served very good quality food. Medical facilities were available but were fewer.

reviews.review_heading: The study structure is good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good because the students take good care of the college property. Hostel is clean with rooms like five star hotel. Hostel's mess food quality is healthy. Food service is the best for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college was built in 1976, and the infrastructure is very good. Our college is like a coastal. Hostel facilities are good, and rooms are also big. Washrooms are available as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is built in 2019. It looks like a cool and peaceful place for me.
reviews.review_text: In my college we have a wonderful Library which has books written by many entrepreneur, and these books are my favourite ones. Wi-Fi speed is average. My classroom was peaceful. Hostel facility is good and the mess is not available. College canteen is average and I don’t spend my time in canteen. Many sports like cricket, hockey, volleyball, football, golafaik, javelin throw etc., are available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with placement cell.
reviews.review_text: College is very old and infrastructure is not so good. Hostel food quality is not good. We have to eat outside even after paying in mess. College is far from the main city. Our college is to get a degree.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good campus and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: In the civil department, our college has a soil mechanics lab. The mechanical department has a great lab. We also have an electric leb. Our college has a huge library. A Wi-Fi facility is also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lukhdhirji Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are excellent. Labs are good, and some labs need to be renovated. The classrooms are big and clean. All the classrooms have CCTV cameras. There is a playground near the campus. Hostels are available near the campus. The campus has a gym, table tennis room etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good enough to satisfy you. All types of necessities you'll finding here. Some classes have air-conditioners. You will get a huge library, playground, and mostly sports are available here but there's no any hostel facility available. Wi-Fi you'll be getting in whole campus and the quality is also good. The condition of the college is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lukhdhirji Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college is Wi-Fi enabled and has good speed. It has well-organised libraries. Mediocre hostels are available at Diploma College. Simple food is offered in the mess and canteen, though sometimes there are issues in water availability. We have the freedom to play games and sports after classes.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, our department has Wi-Fi, a lab, an annexe building, and a library for general study. All infrastructure is very cool. In the hostel, average quality food is available in mess. There is no canteen in some hostel buildings. Medical facilities are available in the deen office.
